{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Blood Sage’s technique
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Sage]]'s technique allows [[Yerin]] to send power to her [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
